name: Quote Extractor
description: Extract quotable lines with speaker/source and context from text.

gettingStarted.title: What is Quote Extractor?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Provide the content or upload documents containing quotes you want to extract. The agent will identify and extract notable quotes with their sources, speakers, and location information.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Quote Extractor analyzes documents and extracts meaningful quotes with proper attribution, source information, and context, making it easy to reference and cite key statements.

inputs.label: Content to Analyze
inputs.description: Provide the content you want to extract quotes from
inputs.placeholder: Enter or paste your content here...

inputs.label: Ground with context
inputs.description: Optionally select artifacts or knowledge to provide additional context

inputs.label: Upload Documents
inputs.description: Upload documents containing quotes you want to extract

schemas.name: document_quotes_extraction

text.description: The exact text of the quote extracted from the document.

source.description: The name or identifier of the document where the quote appeared.

location.description: The location in the source document (such as page number, section, or timestamp) where the quote was found.

quotes.description: A list of extracted quotes from the document.

schemas.description: Schema for extracting structured information from content

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert content analyst. Extract structured information with precision.
config.messageTemplate: Analyze the content and extract structured information.

text.description: The exact text of the quote extracted from the document.

source.description: The name or identifier of the document where the quote appeared.

location.description: The location in the source document (such as page number, section, or timestamp) where the quote was found.

quotes.description: A list of extracted quotes from the document.

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert content analyst. Extract structured information with precision.
